heroHeadline: 65 Years of Revolution: Bay of Pigs, Missile Crisis, Embargo, and the 2021 Uprising
heroSubtitle: Tracking the Cuban Revolution, Cold War confrontations, US embargo, Soviet collapse, and Cuba's ongoing political and economic crises from 1959 to the present
footerNote: Data sourced from US State Department, Cuban government records, Wilson Center Digital Archive, National Security Archive, ECLAC, Human Rights Watch, 14ymedio, and Miami Herald
